stemHtml: Before departure, a wing fairing panel is discovered to be missing. The Configuration Deviation List (CDL) allows dispatch with this panel missing but requires a fuel penalty and speed restriction, whereas the MEL does not list this item. Can you dispatch?

options.a: No, MEL is the only valid document for inoperative items.
options.b: Yes, if the CDL permits it and you apply the penalties.
options.c: No, missing panels are never permitted for ETOPS flights.
options.d: Yes, but only with maintenance approval and captain's discretion.
